2025-10-17.headline: Young Hands Plant the Future in Kenya
2025-10-17.summary: Schoolchildren across Kenya planted more than one million trees to restore forests.
2025-10-17.why: Demonstrates the power of youth in climate action.

2025-10-17.headline: New Hope for Spinal Injury Patients
2025-10-17.summary: Swiss researchers tested a bio-gel implant helping paralyzed patients regain movement.
2025-10-17.why: Brings hope to those living with spinal injuries.

2025-10-17.headline: Solar Energy Hits New Price Record
2025-10-17.summary: Solar power is now the cheapest electricity source in history, costs fell 15% this year.
2025-10-17.why: Affordable renewable energy reshapes the global market.

2025-10-17.headline: Malaria Deaths Drop Sharply
2025-10-17.summary: Malaria deaths worldwide declined by 20% over the past decade thanks to vaccines and nets.
2025-10-17.why: Proof that science and public health save lives.

2025-10-17.headline: Golden Lion Tamarins Return to Brazil’s Forests
2025-10-17.summary: Conservationists reintroduced the rare golden lion tamarin into protected rainforest.
2025-10-17.why: Symbol of hope for endangered species recovery.

2025-10-20.headline: Earth Welcomes a Forest Comeback the Size of Two U.S. States
2025-10-20.summary: Global tree cover expanded by 2.2 million km² in 35 years, equal to Texas and Alaska combined.
2025-10-20.why: Shows how sustained reforestation efforts can reverse climate damage.
